Dialog.name: MND_HIT_ELEVATOR_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}None of the buttons are lit up...[n]Guess the elevator's out of order.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HIT_WORKFENCE_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Seems like the place is under construction.[n]Probably best if I don't trespass...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HIT_WORKSPACE_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like the entire station is[n]undergoing construction.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HIT_WORKSPACE_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Better keep my distance...[n]Looks a little dangerous.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HIT_TELEPHONE_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The light in the phone booth is off.[n]Guess the power's out...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HIT_INFOBOARD_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The dorm doesn't seem to be on the map...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_OUT_STOP_EAST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I think the dorm's in the other direction...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_OUT_STOP_STAIR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should probably head to the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
